<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Numbers; use Psr\Container\ContainerInterface; use Vonage\Client\APIResource; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler\BasicHandler; class ClientFactory { public function __invoke(ContainerInterface $container): Client { /** @var APIResource $api */ $api = $container->make(APIResource::class); $api ->setBaseUrl($api->getClient()->getRestUrl()) ->setIsHAL(false) ->setAuthHandlers(new BasicHandler()); return new Client($api); } }
